mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.username, u.avatar as user_avatar, u.nickname as user_nickname, ru.username as reply_username FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ru ON c.reply_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{dto.pageSize} OFFSET #{dto.offset}
